narrative: Iran peace hopes and weak China demand hammer crude prices, driving a commodity-linked selloff as WTI retreats. USD/CAD firms to 1.3956, testing the highest level since April as the 150bp Fed-BoC carry advantage anchors the bid; gold lower -0.06%; equities +0.68%; DXY -0.10%; VIX 18.7. USD/JPY holds at 160.17, pinned above the intervention threshold by a 300bp SOFR-TONA spread. Watch the Bank of Canada rate decision at 14:00 UTC Wednesday.
